tasks.title: Add log scrolling controls and autoscroll toggle in Executing view
evidence: `App` includes `log_scroll` and `autoscroll`, but `handle_executing_mode_key` only handles `Esc` and never updates those fields.
plan: Add keybindings for scrolling (PgUp/PgDn, Up/Down) and toggling autoscroll.
Update render footer to display new keybindings.
Add tests for log scroll and autoscroll state transitions.

tasks.title: Use actual viewport height for log autoscroll calculations
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/mod.rs` hardcodes `visible_lines = 20` when adjusting log autoscroll, ignoring real terminal size.
plan: Track the execution view height in app state during rendering.
Use that height for log autoscroll and scroll bounds calculations.
Add tests to ensure log scrolling respects viewport size.

tasks.title: Add manual refresh key to reload queue from disk
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/mod.rs` only reloads the queue on `RunnerEvent::Finished`; there is no user-triggered refresh.
plan: Add a refresh keybinding (e.g., `r`) in Normal mode.
Reload queue from disk, clamp selection, and show errors in logs.
Add tests for refresh behavior and selection clamping.

tasks.title: Add priority editing in TUI (cycle or picker)
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/events.rs` does not expose any keybinding to change `TaskPriority` even though the UI renders it.
`App` methods only update status/title/delete; no priority mutation exists in `crates/ralph/src/tui/mod.rs`.
plan: Add an `App` method to cycle or set `TaskPriority` with timestamp updates.
Wire a Normal-mode keybinding (e.g., `p`) and update footer help.
Add tests to verify priority updates and timestamp behavior.

tasks.title: Add TUI flow to create new tasks without leaving the UI
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/events.rs` has no keybinding to create tasks; only delete/edit/status/run are supported.
`crates/ralph/src/tui/mod.rs` lacks any creation flow beyond loading an existing queue.
plan: Design a minimal creation mode (title + status/priority defaults) and integrate with queue persistence.
Add keybinding (e.g., `n`) to enter creation mode and confirm/cancel behavior.
Add tests for creating tasks and validating required fields.

tasks.title: Add search/filter in TUI for status/tag/text
evidence: TUI always renders the full queue list in `crates/ralph/src/tui/render.rs` with no filtering state.
`crates/ralph/src/tui/events.rs` has no search/filter keybindings despite existing queue search utilities in `crates/ralph/src/queue/search.rs`.
plan: Introduce filter state in `App` (query + status/tags).
Add a search input mode and keybindings (e.g., `/` to search, `f` to filter status).
Use queue search/filter utilities to produce the displayed list.
Add tests for filter/search behavior and selection clamping.

tasks.title: Add in-TUI help overlay for keybindings
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/tui/render.rs` only shows a compact footer; there is no full help overlay or key to open it.
`crates/ralph/src/tui/events.rs` has no `?`/`h` handler to show help.
plan: Add a Help mode with a full-screen overlay listing keybindings and actions.
Wire `?`/`h` to toggle Help mode and update footer hints.
Add tests to ensure help mode transitions and rendering paths.

tasks.title: Add empty-queue action prompts (create task / open task command)
evidence: When no tasks exist, `crates/ralph/src/tui/render.rs` renders a static message and provides no action to create tasks in TUI.
plan: Add CTA hints in the empty state (e.g., `n` to create).
Ensure the keybinding launches the creation flow or defers to CLI guidance.
Add tests for empty-state rendering and key behavior.

tasks.title: Document TUI usage and keybindings in CLI docs
evidence: `docs/cli.md` documents `-i` but does not list TUI keybindings or behaviors; keybindings are only in the TUI module doc comment (`crates/ralph/src/tui/mod.rs`).
plan: Add a TUI section to `docs/cli.md` describing entrypoints and keybindings.
Keep docs aligned with actual keybindings and modes.
Add a documentation check in tests if applicable (or update existing doc tests).

tasks.title: Update `ralph run --help` to surface TUI entrypoints and examples
evidence: `crates/ralph/src/cli/run.rs` `RunArgs` after_long_help examples do not include `-i` or TUI launch guidance, so `ralph run --help` omits interactive discovery.
plan: Add TUI examples and a short note to the `RunArgs` after_long_help string.
Verify `ralph run --help` output includes the interactive entrypoint.
Add a small CLI help snapshot test if one exists.

tasks.title: Add CLI parse tests for TUI entrypoint and interactive flags
evidence: Only a single interactive-related test exists (`cli_rejects_run_one_id_with_interactive`) in `crates/ralph/src/cli/mod.rs`; there are no tests ensuring valid `-i` paths parse correctly.
plan: Add CLI parsing tests for `ralph run one -i` and `ralph run loop -i`.
If a new TUI subcommand is added, add parse tests for it.
Ensure tests cover negative and positive interactive cases.
